name: graphql-fuzzer
description: GraphQL introspection and query fuzzing tool for security testing. Enumerates GraphQL schemas, detects authorization flaws, and fuzzes queries for injection vulnerabilities.

metadata.ai_description: graphql-fuzzer is a specialized security testing tool for GraphQL APIs. Use it when you encounter GraphQL endpoints during web application assessments. It performs schema introspection (querying __schema), tests for authorization bypass in queries and mutations, fuzzes query parameters for injection vulnerabilities, and detects batching/DoS attack surfaces. Supports custom query templates and wordlist-based field fuzzing.
use_cases: Introspecting GraphQL schemas to discover all queries and mutations
Detecting authorization bypass in GraphQL resolvers
Fuzzing query parameters for SQLi, NoSQLi, and command injection
Identifying batching attacks and DoS vectors in GraphQL
limitations: Requires introspection to be enabled for schema enumeration
Custom authorization logic may not be detected
Fuzzing effectiveness depends on wordlist quality
May hit rate limits on production APIs

parsing.extraction_hint: Extract discovered GraphQL schema fields, mutations, authorization bypass findings, injection vulnerabilities, and exposed sensitive data

examples.description: Fuzz all queries for authorization bypass
Fuzz with custom wordlist for field discovery
